retry_reason: The put operation is irreversible; if hold_count were already zero, calling this function again would be a misuse (double-free). Retry cannot succeed.
contract_summary: Release one hold on a vma_resource by decrementing hold_count. If this releases the last hold (hold_count reaches zero), signal the unbind fence to indicate unbind completion, release the runtime PM wakeref, remove the resource from the pending_unbind interval tree, and put the pages_rsgt. After calling this function, the caller must not access vma_res as its memory may be freed. Each prior hold must be paired with exactly one call to this function.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is decrementing hold_count and releasing the hold reference; the cleanup actions (fence signal, PM put, tree removal, pages_rsgt put) are part of the release lifecycle and only execute when the last hold is released.
